(2) Rising: Taliyah (buff 26.9), Warwick (buff 26.9), Gragas (W damage). (3) Falling: Briar (HP growth nerf), Zoe (W/E nerfs), Ambessa (ult slowed). (4) Patch 26.9 changes: Deathfire Touch returns, Phase Rush removed, Statikk Shiv rework on-hit, Doran's Helm new item. Pipeline: SEE в†’ READ в†’ ANALYZE в†’ CODE в†’ PUSH в†’ VERIFY в†’ LOG.
